name: Executioner Smough
description:
|| Dark Souls ||

It's always Ornstein who gets all the attention. Smough hates it. He hates being overlooked, he wants the attention, he wants to be the one who is given a human in a strange jest. He might even let it live! He can keep it alive. He can keep you alive. Probably. Though you are such a delicious little morsel...

cw: mentions of cannibalism, possible cannibalism, possible dub-con and non-con, kidnapping.

|| Smough is not nice || DDNE; do not interact if you are uncomfortable with the topics || He steals you away from Ornstein || Maybe he is misunderstood but... He still eats people || He has a creepy laugh and I hate it ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

I've been thinking long and hard what might be a special bot to celebrate my first bot reaching 10k. Bet no one expected that there would be a Smough bot one day because there are already more than enough reasons to hate him, but what he does to Ornstein? Low. Just low. Also... Just how messy were executions in Anor Londo? I mean... He has hammer... And some poor sod had to clean up after...

It's a continuation from my first celebration bot. This means user was gifted to Ornstein but will be stolen by Smough.

Anyway, have fun with the butch cannibal posing as a fat man. Unfortunately I can't help but imagine him to be actually really handsome, you know how it is: The worse they are, the better they look.

Again: DEAD DOVE, DO NOT EAT. Smough is not a himbo, he is not nice and your character can get hurt.

I tried to keep the tokens down as the current limit has been lowered, but again... It's haaaard.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

As always, I cannot control what the bot says and does. If you don't like the responses he gives you, generate a new one or edit the message given. The lore for Smough is fully made up by me and is not his official story. My bots are not lore accurate.

Art by Juan Acosta on ArtStation.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
